ticket.subject: Invoice overcharge
ticket.description: Please check my latest invoice — I was charged twice for the same plan period.

ticket.subject: Cannot login
ticket.description: Can't access my account. The login page says my password is wrong but I just reset it.

ticket.subject: Feature request for dark mode
ticket.description: Please add dark mode to the dashboard — it would greatly improve usability at night.

ticket.subject: App crashes on startup
ticket.description: The mobile app crashes immediately after the splash screen on Android 14.

ticket.subject: Bug in CSV export
ticket.description: The CSV export contains duplicate rows when filtering by date range.

ticket.subject: Refund not received
ticket.description: I cancelled my subscription 10 days ago and still haven't received the refund.

ticket.subject: 2FA code not arriving
ticket.description: The two-factor authentication SMS code is not being delivered to my phone.

ticket.subject: Dashboard not loading
ticket.description: The main dashboard page shows a blank screen after the last update.

ticket.subject: Bulk ticket assignment feature
ticket.description: It would be helpful to have a bulk ticket assignment option for team leads.

ticket.subject: Regression in search after v2.4
ticket.description: The search filter stopped returning results after the v2.4 release.

ticket.subject: Account locked after failed attempts
ticket.description: My account was locked after too many failed login attempts. Please unlock it.

ticket.subject: Server timeout in production
ticket.description: API requests are timing out after 30 seconds — production is affected for all users.

ticket.subject: Google Calendar integration request
ticket.description: It would be great to sync tickets with Google Calendar or Outlook for due-date tracking.

ticket.subject: Wrong tax rate on invoice
ticket.description: The invoice shows a tax rate that doesn't match my registered country's VAT rules.

ticket.subject: File upload always fails
ticket.description: Uploading attachments larger than 2 MB always fails with a 500 internal server error.

ticket.subject: Incorrect analytics data
ticket.description: The ticket count on the analytics page is off by 12 compared to the actual list view.

ticket.subject: Coupon code not applied at checkout
ticket.description: I entered a valid promo code at checkout but the discount wasn't deducted from the total.

ticket.subject: Production is completely down
ticket.description: Critical outage: our entire tenant is down. No users can log in or access any data.

ticket.subject: Payment declined despite valid card
ticket.description: My credit card was declined at renewal even though the card is valid and has sufficient funds.

ticket.subject: SSO via SAML broken
ticket.description: Single sign-on via SAML is broken after the identity provider migration last week.

ticket.subject: Memory leak in backend service
ticket.description: The backend service leaks memory over 24 hours eventually causing out-of-memory crashes.

ticket.subject: Wrong status shown in portal
ticket.description: Tickets marked as resolved still appear as open in the customer-facing support portal.

ticket.subject: MFA app lost — need account recovery
ticket.description: I lost my authenticator app and cannot log in. Need emergency account recovery assistance.

ticket.subject: CSV import stops at row 200
ticket.description: Bulk import via CSV silently stops processing after exactly 200 rows without any error message.

ticket.subject: Webhook stopped firing
ticket.description: Outgoing webhooks stopped delivering payloads to our endpoint three days ago. No errors in logs.

ticket.subject: Duplicate charge on billing cycle
ticket.description: My card was charged twice in the same billing cycle for the same subscription plan.

ticket.subject: Pagination breaks when filter is applied
ticket.description: Applying a category filter resets the page number but the URL still shows page 3, causing an empty result.

ticket.subject: Custom fields for tickets
ticket.description: We need the ability to add custom fields to tickets to track project-specific metadata for reporting.

ticket.subject: Cannot add new payment method
ticket.description: I cannot add a new payment method — the form keeps throwing a validation error on a valid card number.

ticket.subject: General inquiry about priority algorithm
ticket.description: I have a general question about how the ticket priority algorithm determines urgency scores.
